title: Lychnis lagascae
taxonomy: Lychnis lagascae is classified within the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly known as the pink or carnation family. This family is part of the order Caryophyllales. The order Caryophyllales is a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Amaranthaceae and Molluginaceae, among others.
